live.label: Live
live.blurb: Running in production, exercised by tests.

wired.label: Wired
wired.blurb: Built and connected into the daemon; hardening in progress.

standalone.label: Standalone
standalone.blurb: Built and tested in isolation; live wiring is supervised.

mock.label: Mock
mock.blurb: Scaffold / placeholder — explicitly NOT real yet.

caps.name: Vault (AES-GCM, memory-wiped)
caps.detail: Secrets sealed at rest, derived keys zeroed.

caps.name: Post-quantum receipts & seals
caps.detail: ML-DSA-65 signatures on skills and receipts.

caps.name: Secret-guard on every adapter
caps.detail: Outbound text scrubbed of secret-shaped strings.

caps.name: Content-addressed pipeline
caps.detail: SHA-256 freshness model in the engine.

caps.name: Hermetic CI
caps.detail: ~40 allow-listed tests on Node 20 + 22.

caps.name: Skill-seal verification on ingest
caps.detail: verifySkillBlock applied in p2p sync.

caps.name: Hyperswarm DHT + hole-punch
caps.detail: Per-platform bundles built; broad multi-device runs still early.

caps.name: Gossip skill-sync
caps.detail: Peer-to-peer skill propagation with provenance.

caps.name: Economic / on-chain settlement
caps.detail: Offline-signed, never broadcast.

caps.name: Broker env-scoping
caps.detail: Child + sidecars stripped of secrets, NODE_OPTIONS, proxy creds.

caps.name: Exec + WASI sandbox
caps.detail: Sanitized-only, empty preopens, no shell exec.

caps.name: Write-approval (402 loop)
caps.detail: Cost handshake wired into all five channels.

caps.name: Broker → live gateway path
caps.detail: Isolation proven; live wiring done supervised.

caps.name: BYOK cost gate
caps.detail: On /v1/chat/completions — the only spend route.

caps.name: Local ⇄ cloud language routing
caps.detail: Coding → local; complex → proxy.

caps.name: Owner-gating (fail-closed)
caps.detail: No owner set ⇒ no command authority.

caps.name: Self-evolution (narrow class)
caps.detail: Integer-transform skills only, sealed + observed.

caps.name: Five channel adapters
caps.detail: Telegram, Discord, Slack, Matrix, Signal — daemon-started.

caps.name: Browser/exec RCE removed
caps.detail: Unauthenticated new Function() path deleted.

caps.name: Speech & vision (STT/TTS)
caps.detail: Adapters return placeholders.

caps.name: ACP agent-to-agent proxy
caps.detail: Returns scaffolded responses.
